_publications._publicationTitle: Selective nitration of Hsp90 acts as a metabolic switch promoting tumor cell proliferation.

_contextSnippet: Hsp90 NY33 localized in the periphery, in the outer cellular layer...whereas Hsp90 NY56 was found homogenously distributed throughout the cell clusters
resourceName: LSM780 NLO confocal microscope (Carl Zeiss AG)
details: Successfully captured differential spatial distribution of nitrated Hsp90 forms in 3D cell clusters, showing Hsp90 NY33 localized to periphery while Hsp90 NY56 was homogeneously distributed
